---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

What are you trying to do that the library doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see — API shape, behavior, configuration knob, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other libraries, or examples of the
desired behavior from another project.
